name: Inbox Zero
description: Open-source AI email management tool with MCP server. Automates bulk unsubscribing, smart archiving, reply drafting, and rule-based inbox cleanup via AI.

skills.name: Bulk Unsubscribe
skills.description: Identify and unsubscribe from newsletters and marketing emails in bulk with one action

skills.name: Smart Archive
skills.description: Archive emails automatically based on AI-classified categories and user-defined rules

skills.name: Reply Drafting
skills.description: Draft context-aware email replies using AI with your writing style and prior thread

skills.name: Rule Engine
skills.description: Create natural language rules that automatically label, archive, or forward incoming mail

skills.name: MCP Control
skills.description: Manage your inbox programmatically from Claude and MCP-compatible agents via Inbox Zero MCP
